description: Fix review issues #1 (server daimyo broadcast without validation gate) and #4 (no deployed-check in monster recruit confirmation)
steps: 1. In src/server/index.ts RECRUIT_PLACE_DAIMYO handler, add a same-reference check: store old state, call recruitPlaceDaimyo, compare references, return early if unchanged, only then assign and broadcast.
2. In src/store/gameStore.ts doRecruitConfirmMonster action, add a deployedMonsterCardIds check before placing the monster to prevent double-placement of the same card.
acceptance_criteria: Server RECRUIT_PLACE_DAIMYO handler does not broadcast when recruitPlaceDaimyo returns unchanged state
doRecruitConfirmMonster verifies the monsterCardId is not already deployed on the map before placing
findings: Both fixes applied cleanly. Issue #1: Added same-reference check in RECRUIT_PLACE_DAIMYO handler so broadcastState is skipped when recruitPlaceDaimyo returns unchanged state. Issue #4: Added deployedMonsterCardIds set computation and check in doRecruitConfirmMonster to prevent double-placement race condition. TypeScript compiles without errors.
